what_it_does: Defines a static 1600x900 HTML composition titled "Gen3 — the banded stack (v1)" with a centered title, a hatched statistic band, three seasonal plates, blueprint-grid accents, a circular V mark, and a footer wash.
observations: Loads Plus Jakarta Sans from Google Fonts and shared design tokens from /surface/styles/vars.css.
Centers a fixed-size .view artboard on a table-colored page background.
Uses a radial background wash, faint blueprint grid blocks, hatched bands, bordered plates, and soft shadows.
The stat band contains five figures: 9, 1:1, 365, 3, and 12h, each with a short label.
The three plates are Spring · the Cut, Summer · the Drawing, and Winter · the Keeping, with central nouns Quarry, Atelier, and Almanac.
Triangle bullets mark two short fragments at the bottom of each plate.
standouts: A full-width hatched stat band separates the title area from the plate grid.
Seasonal content is organized as three large plates with matching structure.
The palette and spacing are driven mostly through shared CSS variables.
conventions: Self-contained single HTML file with inline CSS and static markup.
Design-token variables are used for color, type, spacing, and radius.
Decorative CSS pseudo-elements create hatch and footer effects without extra markup.
concerns: The composition is fixed-size and not responsive within this file.
External font and stylesheet dependencies are required for the intended rendering.
Several visual meanings depend on token names from the shared stylesheet, which are not defined here.
notes: A static presentation artboard that frames seasonal narrative content as a banded ledger with three structured plates.
questions: What shared token values does /surface/styles/vars.css provide for the intended palette and scale?
Is the 1600x900 size intended as a fixed export frame or should it adapt to other viewports?
What does the circular V mark signify in this composition?
purpose_vs_actual: The title and visible content indicate a banded seasonal stack, and the file implements that as a fixed visual artboard with title, statistics, and three seasonal movement plates.
intention_signals: It seems to be trying to turn a year or season into a structured visual ledger, using craft metaphors, measured bands, and plate-like panels to imply ordered movement through time.
novelty: The combination of blueprint-grid corner accents, a hatched statistical belt, and three tactile seasonal plates gives the file a drafting-table ledger feel.
contribution: Provides a static banded-stack composition pattern: fixed artboard framing, top narrative title, horizontal metric band, three equal seasonal panels, hatch texture, blueprint accents, and token-driven visual styling.
summary_for_embedding: Static HTML/CSS artboard for a Gen3 banded stack layout with title, hatched metrics band, three seasonal plates, blueprint accents, and footer wash.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for presenting seasonal or ledger-like narrative content as an ordered visual stack with measured craft-oriented styling.
